occupation: Director of Supply Partnerships at Vistar Media
headline: Director of Supply Partnerships at Vistar Media
summary:
Director in programmatic in the ad tech & media industry.

Delivering successful results, praised for client success, process implementation & management skills. Strong technical knowledge with the ability to troubleshoot & problem solve proactively & with a team.

experiences.title: Regional Partnerships Director, DSP's, EMEA
experiences.description:
Overseeing DSP Partnerships in EMEA 
Working across; product, technical & operational aspects of the partnerships to support the growth of revenue.

experiences.title: DSP Partnerships EMEA
experiences.description:
VIOOH is changing the conversation as we take the global lead in transforming OOH.

We’re seamlessly bringing together media owners with media buyers.

For OOH operators, we make it easy to increase revenue by optimising your inventory. And, thanks to the latest automation, we help you streamline trading and boost demand.

For media buyers, we make it easy to access premium OOH inventory programmatically on a global basis. So your campaigns always engage with the right audiences at the moments that matter.

experiences.title: Partnerships & Business Manager
experiences.description:
GAY TIMES is a creative agency who works with brands to help them communicate to the LGBTQ+ community in the most authentic way whilst not being tokenistic. 

I worked on key partnerships with brands to successfully communicate their message to the community. 
Including: Mars, GSK, Reebok, J&J Nicorette, Lloyds Bank, Calvin Klein & more.

Partnerships can be found here: https://www.gaytimes.co.uk/category/in-partnership-with/

experiences.title: Senior Account Manager
experiences.description:
Working across all major agencies, Mediacom, WM, OMG, The 7Stars, Mindshare, Havas, Publicis
Successfully delivering campaigns with client elected budgets of £10K to £500K ensuring revenue goals were hit across every campaign 
Daily contact with multiple stakeholders including; agencies, all major DSPs & client internal teams on performance reviews, setting corrective actions on campaigns resulting in campaign successes, setting them up & guiding them through processes.
Effectively training teams on internal processes & guidelines. 
Created bespoke Reporting – daily & post campaign across all campaigns. Building out Looker dashboards & reports 
Positively achieving campaign KPI's, by constantly pivoting strategy
Proactively driving incremental revenues of up to £500K by reviewing demand content that brands can be around against campaign performance. 
Working directly with internal teams across the major agencies on both pre & post sales, upselling & retention. Achieving revenue growth & strong client relationships.
Leading compliance across contracts and invoicing 
Entertaining clients as a company & an individual both agency, DSP & brand side 
Proficient in Paid Media, Salesforce, GSuites, Comscore & Quancast.

experiences.title: Client Solutions Manager
experiences.description:
Successfully responded to briefs from agencies and brands direct when GumGum was first launched in the UK market. 
Proposal win rate growth was significant year on year, increasing by 30% and then 50%.
Producing & responding to RFP’s for direct & programmatic campaigns. Using extensive platform & industry knowledge. 
Effective leader in the office for product knowledge on every aspect of our offering
Consistent & strong communication with agencies daily on proposals & negotiations
Effectively adapted the US CSM role for the EMEA market based upon language, process & setting rates. Resulting in revenue growths over 1000% to over £2M
This enabled us to break into the market more powerfully because I interpreted what the agencies wanted & in turn helped the company to grow from

experiences.title: Senior Regional Sales Support of London at ReachLocal
experiences.description:
After being on the Account Management team for almost 18 months I moved into the operations team to support an entire sales team working directly with the regional sales manager. 

Responsibilities include all from the account manager role but with the below:

•	Daily support to an entire sales team which include:
 o	Google Expert knowledge 
 o	Sales support on meetings & web conferences
 o	Insights into campaign management & Process 
•	Daily reporting to high level management on sales, activity and performance 
•	Running call days, motivating the sales team & rewarding them
•	Working with the regional sales manager to track progress on the team & reporting on this
•	Cross training within my team – knowledge sharing on best practices & processes
 
My Team are fast growing & Great to watch grow and support in their day to day roles.

experiences.title: Account Manager
experiences.description:
We manage your Online Advertising and optimise it to bring your company the best leads whilst showing you these leads and ROI on our unique platform. 
 
I manage accounts for two Senior Internet Marketing consultants who have over 60 advertisers on thier books and over 100 campaigns that is increasing daily. 

I have to have excellent organisational skills to be able to manage over 130 campaigns daily with regards to performance, payment, upselling and relationship. 

ReachLocal is a Premier Partner of Google.

Won the Account Manager Award twice In One Year.

experiences.title: Program Support/Project Consultant
experiences.description:
working with a big client for SkillSoft, taking part in the following activities:

Reporting using Access and Excel
Email Marketing
SIte Maintenance
Site Administration
Maximising the utilisation of the service we provide
Competency mappings

experiences.title: Virtual Administrator
experiences.description:
Working with a major client on the following:

Reporting using Access and Excel
Site administration
User Admin
Session Management
Program Management 
Technical Help

experiences.title: Pensions Administrator
experiences.description:
Sole administrators for the Credit Suisse Pension Fund
Managing current and past employee's pension funds.
Investing and disinvesting funds.
Analysing/calculating pensions, transferring pension funds out.
General administrative duties including; mailings, updates, coordinating files and talking specifically to members of the scheme via telephone and email.

experiences.title: Administrator/ Receptionist
experiences.description:
Administrative support to the sales department, i.e. checking dealer files, ensuring all new cars were taxed, insured and on site.  
Covering the main switchboard; answering the telephone and hosting the showroom
Follow up calls to customers who recently purchased cars.
Marketing for new car launches, I took a big part in the launch of the Audi A5

recommendations:
Sophie Wakim

I’ve had the pleasure to work with Layla for over a year at GumGum. She’s a wonderful colleague, always hands-on and ready to help. Her ability to juggle multiple tasks at the same time is impressive and a huge testimony to her organisational skills.
But most importantly, Layla has always shown a strong dedication to her work and her enthusiasm in coming in to work everyday is contagious. 
Any organisation would be lucky to have her.

Peter Wallace

I had the pleasure of working with Layla for over 3 years. She was extremely passionate about her role, tackling every task with bags of enthusiasm backed up by a solid work ethic. 

Having taken on a couple of roles in the business she has a detailed knowledge of campaign planning & strategy through to activation which is a massive positive. 

More than anything, she built up great relationships with clients and colleagues alike which benefitted the team massively.

Sophie Wakim

Ive had the pleasure to work with Layla for over a year at GumGum. Shes a wonderful colleague, always hands-on and ready to help. Her ability to juggle multiple tasks at the same time is impressive and a huge testimony to her organisational skills.But most importantly, Layla has always shown a strong dedication to her work and her enthusiasm in coming in to work everyday is contagious.
